templates.name: Sentiment Analysis
templates.description: Text sentiment classification with dynamically rendered examples
templates.system_prompt: Classify the sentiment of text as positive, negative, or neutral.

examples.input: I absolutely love this product! It exceeded all my expectations.
examples.output:
Sentiment: Positive
Confidence: High
Reason: Strong positive language ('absolutely love', 'exceeded expectations')

examples.input: The service was okay, nothing special.
examples.output:
Sentiment: Neutral
Confidence: Medium
Reason: Lukewarm language ('okay', 'nothing special') indicates neither strong positive nor negative feelings

examples.input: Terrible experience. Would not recommend to anyone.
examples.output:
Sentiment: Negative
Confidence: High
Reason: Clear negative language ('terrible', 'would not recommend')

templates.name: Entity Extraction
templates.description: Extract structured entities from unstructured text
templates.system_prompt: Extract named entities (people, organizations, locations, dates) from text.
templates.user_prompt_prefix: Extract entities from the following text:

examples.input: Apple Inc. announced on January 15, 2024 that Tim Cook will speak at the San Francisco conference.
The meeting with Microsoft representatives will be held in Seattle next Tuesday.

templates.name: Text Summarization
templates.system_prompt: Create concise, informative summaries that capture key points.
templates.user_prompt_suffix: Provide a 2-3 sentence summary focusing on the main points.

examples.input: The new software update includes several bug fixes and performance improvements. Users have reported faster load times and smoother animations. The development team also added three new features based on user feedback: dark mode, custom shortcuts, and offline support.
examples.output: The software update brings bug fixes, performance improvements, and three user-requested features. Users are experiencing faster load times and smoother animations. New additions include dark mode, custom shortcuts, and offline support.
